summary: Live-applied ADR 0311 from the latest origin/main lineage by adding a repo-managed cmdk command palette to the private Windmill operator access admin surface, seeding the docs-backed f/lv3/command_palette_search helper, and re-verifying the live app plus search path after concurrent drift on shared Windmill verification surfaces required narrower repo-managed repair steps.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_command_palette_search.py tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py tests/test_operator_manager.py -q` returned `28 passed in 0.69s` on the final branch tree.
`./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces yaml json role-argument-specs data-models` passed after the ADR metadata, workstream registry, and receipt wiring were updated.
`make syntax-check-windmill`, `make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-windmill`, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh ansible-syntax` all passed from the isolated worktree.

`make converge-windmill env=production` replayed the repo-managed worker checkout, seed scripts, and raw-app staging onto production but failed closed at the shared `f/lv3/gate-status` verification path when Windmill job `019d4b2b-a00f-b7aa-fbd4-9b4dee1fe75f` returned `Internal: Result of job is invalid json (empty) @jobs.rs:835:20`.

The repo-managed targeted sync for `f/lv3/command_palette_search` returned `{"status":"ok","count":1}` and the live manual verification returned `{"status":"ok","query":"totp","count":5}` with ADR and runbook matches from the search-fabric index.

A targeted repo-managed raw-app sync pushed five remote changes, and the Windmill app API summary now records `latest_version: 58` with `has_command_palette_import`, `has_command_palette_backend`, `has_command_palette_cta`, `has_command_palette_file`, and `policy_has_command_palette_search` all true.

notes: This receipt records the branch-local latest-main proof before the protected release and integrated-truth surfaces are updated on an exact-main integration branch.

The first governed production replay failed closed in the shared `f/lv3/gate-status` lane, and a separate live API inspection showed the operator raw app later drifted away from the command palette bundle during concurrent work. The branch therefore used narrower repo-managed syncs of `f/lv3/command_palette_search` and `f/lv3/operator_access_admin` rather than overwriting unrelated shared verification code out of band.

Protected follow-up still waits for merge-to-main: `VERSION`, release sections in `changelog.md`, the top-level `README.md` status summary, `versions/stack.yaml`, and any canonical mainline receipt or generated truth surfaces.

A direct branch push to GitHub was blocked by the remote pre-push gate because it also wants exact-main-only generated-surface updates to `docs/diagrams/agent-coordination-map.excalidraw`, `build/platform-manifest.json`, and canonical-truth outputs touching `changelog.md` plus `versions/stack.yaml`.
